templates.name: Cover Flow
templates.description: Flip through your open tabs like album covers — a visual, tactile tab switcher that floats over the page.

templates.description: A research workspace: snip regions, clip pages, and organize your sources by session.

templates.description: Preview the same page at phone, tablet, and desktop widths side by side — with a notes sidebar for your build.
